title: Google TPU 8t and 8i is here..
summary: Google released TPU 8t for training and TPU 8i for inference, served via Virgo Network to enable high throughput. The video compares these ASICs to NVIDIA GPUs and examines how scaling strategies affect token economics and LLM serving costs.
